Today is February 18, 2026. Rescuers are searching for nine missing skiers in the Castle Peak area of California. According to Sierra Avalanche Center Forecaster Steve Reynaud, what was the specific destructive scale rating of the avalanche that trapped the group?
(A) D2.5
(B) D2.0
(C) D4.0
(D) D1.5
(E) D5.0
explanation: The article explicitly states that Steve Reynaud told ABC News 10 that the avalanche was rated as a "D2.5 on a scale of D1 to D5."
model_output:
According to recent reports from the Sierra Avalanche Center and associated news coverage, the avalanche in question was rated as a D2.5 on the destructive scale by Forecaster Steve Reynaud. This is based on the direct observation report from the Center and corroborating articles attributing the rating to him.

<final_answer>
(A)
</final_answer>

CITATIONS:
- Sierra Avalanche Center ([https://www.sierraavalanchecenter.org/observations/avalanches/83ba330a-5eb4-446e-95b0-495c26faf06b])[[1]](https://www.sierraavalanchecenter.org/observations/avalanches/83ba330a-5eb4-446e-95b0-495c26faf06b)
- FOX5 San Diego ([https://fox5sandiego.com/news/10-backcountry-skiers-missing-after-avalanche-in-northern-california])[[2]](https://fox5sandiego.com/news/10-backcountry-skiers-missing-after-avalanche-in-northern-california)
- FOX8 ([https://fox8.com/news/6-skiers-rescued-9-still-missing-after-california-avalanche])[[3]](https://fox8.com/news/6-skiers-rescued-9-still-missing-after-california-avalanche)

Today is February 18, 2026. Mark Zuckerberg is testifying in a California court regarding social media addiction. According to emails presented by lawyer Mark Lanier, what specific percentage increase in "time spent" did Zuckerberg set as a goal for executives in 2015?
(A) 10%
(B) 12%
(C) 15%
(D) 16%
(E) 20%
explanation: The text states that in 2015, Zuckerberg told executives his goals included seeing "time spent increase by 12%."
model_output:
Based on recent news reports about the ongoing trial in California where Mark Zuckerberg is testifying regarding social media addiction claims, emails presented by lawyer Mark Lanier indicate that Zuckerberg set a goal in 2015 for executives to increase "time spent" on Meta platforms by 12%.[[1]](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3wlpqpe2z4o)[[2]](https://www.legalaffairsandtrials.com/p/meta-and-google-begin-trial-in-lawsuit)[[3]](https://www.heraldonline.co.zw/instagram-youtube-owners-accused-of-building-addiction-machines-for-the-worlds-kids) This matches details from coverage of the trial's earlier proceedings, though testimony is continuing as of today (February 18, 2026).

<final_answer>
(B)
</final_answer>

CITATIONS:
- BBC ([https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3wlpqpe2z4o])
- Legal Affairs and Trials ([https://www.legalaffairsandtrials.com/p/meta-and-google-begin-trial-in-lawsuit])
- Herald Online ([https://www.heraldonline.co.zw/instagram-youtube-owners-accused-of-building-addiction-machines-for-the-worlds-kids])

Today is February 18, 2026. Venezuela's acting leader Delcy Rodríguez is navigating a complex relationship with the US administration. Following the detention of Nicolás Maduro, what specific volume of oil did Donald Trump announce that Caracas had agreed to deliver?
(A) 25 million barrels
(B) 30 million barrels
(C) 50 million barrels
(D) 60 million barrels
(E) 100 million barrels
explanation: The article states that "Trump announced that Caracas had agreed to deliver up to 50 million barrels of oil."
model_output:
The scenario described appears to be based on events unfolding in early 2026, following the detention of Nicolás Maduro and the installation of Delcy Rodríguez as acting leader. Based on available reports, initial announcements in January referenced a range of 30-50 million barrels, but a more recent and specific announcement by Trump in early February pinpointed the volume at 50 million barrels en route to Houston.

<final_answer>
(C)
</final_answer>

CITATIONS:

===============================================

Today is February 18, 2026. Following the defection of Matt Jeneroux from the Conservatives, how many total seats does Prime Minister Mark Carney’s Liberal Party now hold in the Canadian House of Commons?
(A) 166
(B) 172
(C) 170
(D) 169
(E) 165
explanation: The article states: "With the addition of Jeneroux, the Liberals now have 169 seats, putting them just three shy of the required 172 for majority."
model_output:
Based on web searches, as of February 18, 2026, the Canadian House of Commons has 343 seats following redistribution for the 2025 federal election[[1]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/By-elections_to_the_45th_Canadian_Parliament). Multiple sources confirm that Conservative MP Matt Jeneroux defected to the Liberals on this date, which is described as the latest in a series of recent defections[[2]](https://www.cbc.ca/news/politics/jeneroux-joins-liberals-9.7095322)[[3]](https://www.aol.com/articles/third-conservative-canadian-mp-defects-171039527.html)[[4]](https://www.marketscreener.com/news/canada-s-carney-edges-closer-to-majority-as-legislator-defects-to-liberals-ce7e5dded08df725). After this defection, the Liberals hold 169 occupied seats (with three vacancies in the House overall, requiring 172 for a majority)[[4]](https://www.marketscreener.com/news/canada-s-carney-edges-closer-to-majority-as-legislator-defects-to-liberals-ce7e5dded08df725)[[1]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/By-elections_to_the_45th_Canadian_Parliament).

<final_answer>
(D)
</final_answer>

CITATIONS:
- [CBC News] (https://www.cbc.ca/news/politics/jeneroux-joins-liberals-9.7095322)
- [AOL] (https://www.aol.com/articles/third-conservative-canadian-mp-defects-171039527.html)
- [Marketscreener] (https://www.marketscreener.com/news/canada-s-carney-edges-closer-to-majority-as-legislator-defects-to-liberals-ce7e5dded08df725)
- [Wikipedia] (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/By-elections_to_the_45th_Canadian_Parliament)

explanation: The article mentions that the Air Force is implementing the scheme on the VC-25B, four C-32 jets, and a donated Qatari jet, and explicitly notes: "Painting has been completed on of the C-32 aircraft."
model_output:

Other aircraft like the VC-25B are mentioned as part of the planned updates but are not yet completed.

<final_answer>

Today is February 18, 2026. Mikaela Shiffrin has won Olympic gold in the slalom in Cortina. By what specific time margin did she defeat the silver medalist to secure her third Olympic title?
(A) 1.50 seconds
(B) 1.39 seconds
(C) 0.71 seconds
(D) 2.13 seconds
(E) 1.08 seconds
explanation: The article states that Shiffrin claimed gold "in emphatic style by an extraordinary 1.50sec margin."
model_output:
Based on the web search results for the 2026 Winter Olympics women's slalom event in Cortina, Mikaela Shiffrin won the gold medal with a combined time of 1:39.10[[1]](https://www.cbssports.com/olympics/news/winter-olympics-2026-live-updates-day-12-results-highlights/live), defeating the silver medalist (Switzerland's Camille Rast) by a margin of 1.50 seconds[[2]](https://www.nytimes.com/athletic/live-blogs/winter-olympics-2026-milano-cortina-live-updates-day-12-schedule-events-scores-results/Wzsm0qPs1Jdh/7CyRimeVKnvQ)[[3]](https://www.ksdk.com/article/sports/olympics/trending-in-milan-cortina/mikaela-shiffrin-womens-slalom-results-medal-olympics/507-6e12e341-6204-4232-b7b1-c771188da069)[[1]](https://www.cbssports.com/olympics/news/winter-olympics-2026-live-updates-day-12-results-highlights/live). This marked her third Olympic gold medal overall.

<final_answer>
(A)
</final_answer>

Today is February 18, 2026. Stephen Colbert has accused CBS of spiking an interview due to FCC concerns. According to the report, how much did Paramount Global agree to pay in July to settle a legal dispute with Donald Trump regarding a CBS interview with Kamala Harris?
(A) $10 million
(B) $25 million
(C) $13.5 million
(D) $16 million
(E) $20 million
explanation: The article states: "Paramount Global, the parent company of CBS, agreed in July to pay $16m (£13.5m) to settle a legal dispute with Trump..."
model_output:
The settlement in question appears to be related to a lawsuit over alleged deceptive editing in a "60 Minutes" interview with Kamala Harris. Based on multiple reports, including a recent one tying into Colbert's accusation, Paramount Global agreed to pay $16 million in July 2025 to settle the matter. Some reports mention Trump anticipating additional funds from other parties (such as new owners after a merger), but the amount Paramount itself agreed to pay is consistently reported as $16 million.

<final_answer>
(D)
</final_answer>

- [The Guardian][[1]](https://www.theguardian.com/tv-and-radio/2026/feb/17/colbert-trump-administration-censorship-cbs) (https://www.theguardian.com/tv-and-radio/2026/feb/17/colbert-trump-administration-censorship-cbs)

Today is February 18, 2026. Following the death of Jesse Jackson, former POW Andrew Ramirez recalled his release from Yugoslav forces. On what specific date in 1999 were Ramirez and his fellow soldiers finally released?
(A) 1 May
(B) 2 May
(C) 30 April
(D) 15 May
(E) 28 April
explanation: The article states: "The soldiers were released on 1 May and crossed into Croatia with Jackson and his delegation on 2 May..."
model_output:
I reviewed historical records and news articles from 1999 related to the Kosovo War. Three US soldiers—Staff Sgt. Andrew Ramirez, Staff Sgt. Christopher Stone, and Spc. Steven Gonzales—were captured by Yugoslav forces on March 31, 1999. Rev. Jesse Jackson negotiated with Yugoslav President Slobodan Milosevic on May 1, 1999, leading to their release the following day.

<final_answer>
(B)
</final_answer>

(A) Carney's speech at the World Economic Forum
(B) Pierre Poilievre's leadership vote
(C) A meeting with his family over the holidays
(D) The resignation of Chrystia Freeland
(E) A private meeting with the US President
explanation: The article states: "Jeneroux told reporters that the prime minister's speech at the World Economic Forum last month is what ultimately swayed his decision to join the Liberals."
model_output:
I reviewed various news sources reporting on Matt Jeneroux's defection to the Liberal Party on February 18, 2026. Multiple articles, including from the BBC and CBC, directly quote or reference Jeneroux citing Prime Minister Mark Carney's speech at the World Economic Forum (in Davos) as the key event that ultimately swayed his decision, describing it as a "rallying cry" amid concerns over national unity and U.S. relations. While some reports mention family reflections over the holidays as part of his thought process, the speech is consistently highlighted as the decisive factor.

<final_answer>
(A)
</final_answer>

Today is February 18, 2026. The US Air Force is repainting executive jets. Which specific variation of the Boeing 747 is currently used to transport the US President and is slated for the new gold-accented color scheme?
(A) Boeing 747-400
(B) Boeing VC-25B
(C) Boeing 747-8i
(D) Boeing C-32
(E) Boeing 757-200
explanation: The article states: "...it was implementing the new colour scheme on the Boeing VC-25B (a variation of the Boeing 747) currently used to transport the president..."
model_output:
### Reasoning

Based on web search results and page browses from February 17-18, 2026, the current aircraft used to transport the US President (Air Force One) are still the VC-25A models, based on the Boeing 747-200 variant. These are not mentioned as being repainted in the new gold-accented scheme (red, white, dark blue, and gold).

However, the next-generation Air Force One aircraft, designated VC-25B (modified from the Boeing 747-8i), are explicitly slated for this new color scheme. Additionally, a donated Qatari Boeing 747-8i is being modified for use as an interim or additional Air Force One and is also getting the new paint, with delivery expected by summer 2026. The main VC-25B deliveries are projected for 2027-2028.

The question specifies a "variation of the Boeing 747" that is "currently used" for the President "and is slated for the new gold-accented color scheme." The VC-25A does not match the options and is not slated for repainting. The VC-25B is not yet in service as of February 18, 2026, but it is the specific variation designed for presidential transport and confirmed to receive the new scheme. The Boeing 747-8i is the base model for VC-25B, but the options distinguish them, and VC-25B is the precise military variation referenced in sources for the repaint.

Given the options and source emphasis on VC-25B as the slated presidential 747 variant, (B) is the best fit.

CITATIONS:
- Reuters [web:0] (https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/us-air-force-unveils-new-paint-scheme-air-force-one-executive-aircraft-fleet-2026-02-17)
- New York Post [web:13] (https://nypost.com/2026/02/17/us-news/air-force-presidential-fleet-being-transformed-into-trumps-signature-red-gold-and-blue-color-scheme)
- Wikipedia [web:16] (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Air_Force_One)
- CBS News [web:26] (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/u-s-air-force-vip-plane-fleet-trump-paint-colors)
- Air and Space Forces [web:18] (https://www.airandspaceforces.com/new-air-force-one-delivery-shifts-2028)
- Simple Flying [web:19] (https://simpleflying.com/why-worlds-most-expensive-commercial-jet-air-force-one-replacement)
- Flying Mag [web:20] (https://www.flyingmag.com/air-force-to-buy-lufthansa-747s-for-presidential-airlift)
- Reuters browse summary [web:33] (https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/us-air-force-unveils-new-paint-scheme-air-force-one-executive-aircraft-fleet-2026-02-17)
- CBS browse summary [web:34] (https://www.cbsnews.com/amp/news/u-s-air-force-vip-plane-fleet-trump-paint-colors)
- Fox News browse summary [web:35] (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/air-force-one-scraps-iconic-kennedy-era-paint-scheme-trump-approved-red-white-blue-design)
- Air and Space Forces [web:39] (https://www.airandspaceforces.com/new-bridge-air-force-one-qatar-to-fly-this-summer)

<final_answer>
(B)
</final_answer>

(A) A broken leg and torn ligaments
(B) A severe concussion and memory loss
(C) A puncture wound and muscle damage to her stomach
(D) A fractured wrist and shoulder dislocation
(E) An "invisible injury" to her knee
explanation: The article states: "...she crashed in a giant slalom race in Killington in December 2024, sustaining a puncture wound and muscle damage to her stomach."
model_output:
Based on web search results, Mikaela Shiffrin suffered a crash during a giant slalom race in Killington, Vermont, on November 30, 2024 (noting that the question specifies December, but this appears to be the relevant incident based on all available details). The injuries were a puncture wound to her abdomen along with severe muscle trauma/damage (requiring surgery), which aligns with option (C). No broken bones, ligament damage, or other injuries mentioned in the options were reported.

<final_answer>
(C)
</final_answer>
